title: HSC 90 Pcs Baby Shower Decorations Girl, Baby Shower Stickers, It's A Girl Stickers - Pink Girls Stickers, 10 Sheets with 9 Designs for Girl‘s Birthday Party Decorations
features: Generous Quantity & Adorable Designs: This pack includes 90 pink baby shower stickers, featuring 10 sheets with 9 charming designs each. Perfect for adding a special touch to your "It's a Girl" baby shower party decorations and creating memorable moments.

Perfect Size & Easy Application: Each sticker measures 1.9cm in diameter, making them ideal for various decoration needs. Simply peel and stick onto smooth surfaces - they adhere securely and remove cleanly without leaving residue.

Premium Quality Material: Made from safe, non-toxic adhesive paper with vibrant pink colours and a matte finish. These gender reveal stickers are environmentally friendly and designed specifically for baby shower celebrations.

Versatile Party Use: Excellent for baby shower voting games, decorating party favours, gifts, water bottles, mason jars, candles, and treat bags. Also work wonderfully as seals for invitations, thank you cards, and welcome bags.

Ideal for Girl Celebrations: Specifically designed for "It's a Girl" baby shower parties, these pink stickers are perfect for gender reveal events, nursery decorations, and adding a feminine touch to your special celebration supplies.
description: Product description Product Specification Quantity: 90 pieces (10 sheets with 9 designs each) Colour: Pink Size: 1.9cm diameter Shape: Round Material: Paper with self-adhesive backing Applications: Baby shower party decorations, gender reveal games, and invitation seals Package Contents 10 sheets of pink baby shower stickers 9 different designs per sheet Total 90 stickers Features Lightweight and easy to use - simply peel and stick to various surfaces Vibrant pink colours with clear, cute designs perfect for girl baby showers Suitable for multiple party decoration purposes and voting games Additional Information Please note: Actual colours may vary slightly due to monitor differences Designed specifically for baby shower decorations and gender reveal parties Ideal for creating beautiful "It's a Girl" celebration themes Safety Warning NO
